title: Equivalence check issue with hierarchy
body:
Hi,

I am having an issue with equivalence check when my gate module have multiple levels of hierarchy. The sample code is:

```
module gold(input i1, input i2, output o1);
 assign o1 = i1 & i2;
endmodule

module in_w(i1, i2, o1) ;
  input i1, i2;
  output o1;
  assign o1 = (i1 & i2);
endmodule

module top_w( i1, i2, o1);
  input i1, i2;
  output o1;
  in_w dut(.in1(in1), .in2(in2), .o1(o1));
endmodule
```

I am using the following script:

```
#flatten
equiv_make gold top_w equiv
#flatten
hierarchy -top equiv
opt -purge
equiv_simple
equiv_status -assert
```

I tried flatten in both noted places, and not using it at all, and in all the three cases the equiv_status failed.
Comparing with in_w yields a successful comparison.

```
equiv_make gold in_w equiv
hierarchy -top equiv
opt -purge
equiv_simple
equiv_status -assert
```
code_blocks:
#flatten
equiv_make gold top_w equiv
#flatten
hierarchy -top equiv
opt -purge
equiv_simple
equiv_status -assert

equiv_make gold in_w equiv
hierarchy -top equiv
opt -purge
equiv_simple
equiv_status -assert
